recommendation: Use lookup/reference validation for domain-controlled fields.
testing_suggestion: Add accepted-values tests for categorical columns.
preventive_control: Use governed master data and lookup-controlled values.

recommendation: Encode business rules in ETL tests and monitor failures over time.
testing_suggestion: Add custom rule-based assertions for cross-column logic.
preventive_control: Version-control business rules and test them automatically.

recommendation: Introduce schema enforcement and pre-load casting tests.
testing_suggestion: Add datatype contract tests between stages.
preventive_control: Automate schema checks in CI/CD for ETL pipelines.

recommendation: Enforce primary key uniqueness before load.
testing_suggestion: Add uniqueness tests for primary key columns in ETL.
preventive_control: Use unique key constraints in staging and target layers.

recommendation: Apply deduplication logic and enforce unique row checks in ETL.
testing_suggestion: Add duplicate row detection tests after transformation and before load.
preventive_control: Implement dedupe keys and idempotent load design.

recommendation: Standardize date formats and reject malformed date strings.
testing_suggestion: Add strict date parsing tests for date fields.
preventive_control: Force ISO date ingestion and date parser validation.

recommendation: Validate email patterns at capture time and quarantine invalid rows.
testing_suggestion: Add regex validation tests for email fields.
preventive_control: Use field-level regex validation in UI/API layers.

recommendation: Block records with nulls in critical fields or route to quarantine.
testing_suggestion: Add non-null tests for required fields.
preventive_control: Add source completeness SLAs and null-prevention checks.

recommendation: Validate input schema before processing starts.
testing_suggestion: Add schema-presence tests before ETL execution.
preventive_control: Implement schema registry and contract validation.

recommendation: Apply non-negative constraints for sensitive business metrics.
testing_suggestion: Add non-negative assertions for financial and demographic metrics.
preventive_control: Apply business constraints and reject invalid transactions early.

recommendation: Impute, backfill, or enforce non-null source validations.
testing_suggestion: Add row-level completeness tests for mandatory fields.
preventive_control: Add source mandatory-field controls and upstream completeness dashboards.

recommendation: Review business thresholds and validate source extraction anomalies.
testing_suggestion: Add threshold-based anomaly tests on sensitive numeric columns.
preventive_control: Add statistical threshold alerts and anomaly monitoring.

recommendation: Use regex-based checks in source forms and ETL transformations.
testing_suggestion: Add regex rule tests for domain-formatted columns.
preventive_control: Centralize regex standards and re-use across pipelines.

recommendation: Add min/max validation gates in ETL pipeline.
testing_suggestion: Add min/max validation tests for numeric fields.
preventive_control: Establish rule catalog for valid numeric boundaries.

recommendation: Validate foreign keys against master/reference dataset before load.
testing_suggestion: Add foreign-key validation tests against reference data.
preventive_control: Maintain authoritative reference datasets and key synchronization.

recommendation: Sanitize text inputs and apply regex cleansing rules.
testing_suggestion: Add regex sanitation tests for text fields.
preventive_control: Introduce input sanitization and approved character policies.
